titleStmt.title: SII 22.282: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 282. (A.R. No. 282 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. RĀJARĀJAKĒSARIVARMAN (RĀJARĀJA I) who destroyed the ships at Kāndaḷūr-Śālai— 12th YEAR (A.D. 996-97).

summary.p: This records a similar agreement given by the Ūrār of Paḷugūr in Paḷugūrnāḍu that they would pay, by way of interest on 60 kaḻañju of gold received by them from the temple at Tirumālpēṟu, 225 kāḍi of paddy to be measured out in the temple in the month of Paṅguṇi every year. Reference is made to a fine of 100 kaḻañju realised by the temple as a result of the inspection of the temple management made by Madhurāntakaṇ Gaṇḍarādittaṉār in the 4th year of the king, and out of which 60 kaḻañju had been invested with the sabhā of Śiṟṟūr as recorded in No. 281 above. Some transaction of the 14th year of a king (probably Uttama-Chōḷa) is also recorded at the end but the details are not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti
śrī . kā
ntaḷūrcālai
kalamaṟutta
korāja rāja
kecari pan
maṟkku yāṇṭu 10 2
āvatu maṇai
viṟkoṭṭattu
p paḷukūrnāṭṭu
p paḷukūr Ūrom
kaiyyeḻuttu tā
markkoṭṭattu val
lanāṭṭut tirumāṟ
peṟṟu tribhuvaṉa
caṇḍeśvaraṉ kāṇi
yāl yāṅkaḷkoṇṭu ka
ṭava poṉ tanmakaṭṭaḷaikkallāl tuḷaini
ṟai Aṟupatiṉkaḻañcu Ippoṉ Aṟupatiṉ ka
ḻañcuṅkoṇṭa paricāvatu Ippoṉṉukku
p policai nelluk kaḻañciṉvāy Āṇṭuvarai Ūrakat
tuniṉṟār nārācattoṭokkum kālāl mukkāṭi mukkā
lum Āka Ippoṉ Aṟupatiṉkaḻañcukkum Eṟṟi nellu
Irunūṟṟirupattaiṅkāṭiy nellum Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum
paṅkuṉittiṅkaḷ tirumālppeṟuṭaiyār koyilil
tirumuṟṟattukkey koṭuvantu pāḻum patarum vālum pu
ḻutiyum cellum nikkit tūyavākkip pākkūliyum (vāṭākūliyum ?) cu
ṅkamum nāṅkaḷe paṭṭu tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyāṟ devakaṉmi
kaḷvacam Aḷantu taravukoḷvomāṉom paḷukūr Ū
rom Ippoṉṉukkuṭalāṉa poṉ Ittevarkku nālāva
tu maturāntakaṉ kaṇṭarātittaṉ tirumālpeṟṟu tiruvuṇ
ṇāḻikaiyuṭaiyārkaḷait tiruvagniśvaramuṭaiyārkku śrī pali muṭ
ṭa viṭṭārkaḷeṉṟu Ittiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyuṭaiyārkaḷait taṇ
ṭaṅ koṇṭu tirumāṟpeṟuṭaiyār paṇṭārattu vaitta po
ṉ nūṟṟukkaḻañcu Itu tiruvagniśvaramuṭaiyāritu Ippoṉ nūṟṟu
kkaḻañcilum ciṟṟūr sabhaiyom nel policaikkuk
kuṭuttamai Aṟupatiṉkaḻañcu . panmaṟku yāṇ
ṭu 10 4- Āvatil tevakanmikaḷ raikkālum
yāṇṭu 4- Āvatil devakanmikaṉai maturā
n=takaṉ kaṇṭarātittaṉ taṇṭaṅkoṇṭu
vaicca poṉ nāṟkaḻañcum talaivilai
ppoṉ mukkaḻañcilum I kaḻañcu Iṉ
ṉellukku kokkuṟṟamuṅ kuṭikkuṟṟamum Erikkuṟṟa
muñ collāte Āṭṭāṇṭu
toṟum
Digital edition of SII 22.282 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
